name: plan-read-then-plan
description: Agent reads a file first, then writes a plan based on its contents

turns.user: Read main.go and create a plan to address all the TODO items.

input.title: Address TODOs in main.go
input.content:
## Overview
The main.go file has three TODO items that need to be addressed.

## Steps
1. Add error handling: wrap operations in error checks, create a central error handler, and return meaningful exit codes
2. Add logging: integrate the slog package, add structured log calls at key points, and configure log levels
3. Add config file support: create a config struct, add YAML parsing with a default config path, and load config at startup

responses.text: I read main.go and identified three TODOs. The plan covers adding error handling, structured logging, and config file support.
